creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Submitter's feedback received (see below). Still waiting for maintainer's
feedback.

Eric Crist, 29.04.13, 13:57h CEST:

> The problem still exists.  With "one shot" enabled, group membership
> just isn't read at all from LDAP.  Removing the line from the config
> allows LDAP group memberships to be read.  I still consider this a bug,
> however.
>
